headline: Arcos Dorados (ARCO) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Arcos Dorados (ARCO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +54.55% and +2.20%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
